description_long: This object is a small potted plant featuring thick, pointed, green leaves arranged in a rosette pattern, typical of many succulent species. The leaves have a slightly waxy appearance with lighter green edges and darker green centers, giving the plant a vibrant, healthy look. The plant is set in a simple, faceted black pot with a matte finish, and the top layer of the soil is visible, rendered in a brown color. The pot has a geometric, almost polygonal shape, with straight sides and a flat base, providing stability. There are no visible decorative elements or labels on the pot, and the overall design is minimalist and modern. This type of plant and pot combination is commonly used for indoor decoration, especially on desks, shelves, or windowsills in urban environments.
description: A small, vibrant green succulent with pointed leaves in a faceted black pot, featuring a minimalist and modern design. The pot is plain and the plant appears healthy and well-kept.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rosette of green succulent leaves and the faceted black pot.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the plant and pot, with leaves aligned in a single plane.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the symmetrical arrangement of the leaves and the pot's shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the plant's narrowest profile and the straight sides of the pot.
